title: Lottie Like Animation

statement.markdown:
## Lottie Like Animation

Create an animation of a circle bouncing around a canvas using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The circle should start at the top center of the canvas and bounce to the bottom center before coming back to the top center again. The animation should repeat indefinitely.

### Requirements

1. The animation should be smooth and should not have any glitches.

2. The circle should bounce off the bottom of the canvas and not pass through it.

3. The animation should be optimized for a modern browser.

4. The canvas should have a background color of `#f7f7f7`.

constraints: Use HTML5 canvas element to create the animation
Use JavaScript to animate the circle
Use CSS for styling the canvas and the circle
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling the canvas and the circle

starterCode.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">

<head>

    <meta charset="UTF-8">

    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

    <title>Lottie Like Animation</title>

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/tailwindcss/2.2.19/tailwind.min.css">

</head>

<body>

    <canvas id="canvas" class="w-full h-screen bg-gray-200"></canvas>

    <script src="script.js"></script>

</body>

</html>

gradingCriteria.description: The animation should be smooth and should not have any glitches.
The circle should bounce off the bottom of the canvas and not pass through it.
The animation should be optimized for a modern browser.
The canvas should have a background color of #f7f7f7.
